column1: #   NAME     unique test id; '/' separates section from local name
#   FIXTURE  filename under tests/FIX/  (or '-' to reuse the previous row's compile)
#   CMD      oc invocation flags (prepended to fixture).  Empty = default compile.
#            'fails' means the compile is expected to exit non-zero;
#            EXPECT must be 'compile-fails'.  Otherwise CMD is splatted in front
#            of the fixture, e.g. CMD='/ENTRY=Main' → oc /ENTRY=Main FIXTURE.
#   EXPECT   one of: has-import no-import has-global no-global code-starts
#   ARG      EXPECT-specific argument (single field; rdfgrep handles internal spaces)
#   MEMBER   optional .om member to inspect for RDF predicates.  Empty = use the
#            first uppercase .RDF extracted from the .om.  Set to e.g. MAIN.RDF
#            to inspect a specific member when the .om contains several .rdfs.
# After compile, the produced <base>.om is unpacked into the row's workdir.

column5: 89 C1 D1 E0 D1 E0 2B C1
